title: kb.checkpoint.created v1
description: Emitted by kb (src/commands/checkpoint.rs:407) when a `kb checkpoint` run finishes writing checkpoint.md and supporting artifacts (spv copies, diff, screenshots) for a TEngine verification session. Source: /kb.

entry_id.description: UUID of the created checkpoint vault entry.

slug.description: Checkpoint slug used for the entry/dir name.

passed.description: Whether the checkpointed session passed verification.

fps_avg.description: Average FPS recorded for the session.

shaders_changed.description: Number of shader files changed since the prior checkpoint.

plan.description: Optional plan reference supplied via CheckpointOptions.plan.

dir.description: Directory the checkpoint artifacts were written to.
